summary: Read-only plan-mode classification for cluster gitcrawl-110-plan-ramp. No GitHub mutations are planned. #91134 remains the canonical path for #80536; #63380 and #74974 are separate non-duplicate root causes; #74635 is already closed; security-sensitive linked #63924 is quarantined only.
